title: Hamilton, WKO — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Hamilton, WKO: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Hamilton is a city in WKO with a population of 185,000. A vibrant river city in the Waikato region, known for its agricultural research, university, and proximity to Hobbiton.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
